allow: Bash(node -e "try { const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('bible.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('OK, books:', d.length\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('ERROR:', e.message.slice\(0,200\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('bible.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('OK, books:', d.length\); d.forEach\(b => console.log\(b.id, 'chapters:', b.chapters.length\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('ERROR:', e.message.slice\(0,200\)\); }")
